requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 and Heat-Derating Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2及高温降额证据
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2及高溫降額證據

summary.en: South Sudan's national standards infrastructure, led by SSNBS, is still developing and no mature solar-inverter-specific mandatory certification route has been identified. For serious grid, mini-grid, donor-funded, or commercial PV projects, IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 safety type-test evidence should be treated as the practical baseline. Given South Sudan's heat, dust, diesel/off-grid use cases, and limited maintenance capacity, the safety file should also include thermal derating curves, ingress-protection ratings, installation altitude/ambient assumptions, and clear operating instructions for high-temperature sites.
summary.zh: 由SSNBS牵头的南苏丹国家标准基础设施仍在发展中，目前未识别到成熟的太阳能逆变器专项强制认证路径。对于严肃的并网、微电网、捐助方资助或商业光伏项目，应将IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全型式试验证据作为实际基准。鉴于南苏丹的高温、粉尘、柴油/离网应用场景和有限维护能力，安全文件还应包括热降额曲线、防护等级、安装海拔/环境假设，以及适用于高温现场的清晰操作说明。
summary.zht: 由SSNBS牽頭的南蘇丹國家標準基礎設施仍在發展中，目前未識別到成熟的太陽能逆變器專項強制認證路徑。對於嚴肅的併網、微電網、捐助方資助或商業光伏項目，應將IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2安全型式試驗證據作為實際基準。鑑於南蘇丹的高溫、粉塵、柴油/離網應用場景和有限維護能力，安全文件還應包括熱降額曲線、防護等級、安裝海拔/環境假設，以及適用於高溫現場的清晰操作說明。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SSNBS standards-adoption and conformity expectations for imported electrical goods, where applicable
Project-owner or donor procurement specifications for South Sudan PV, mini-grid, and off-grid power systems

summary.en: China-side safety documentation for PV inverters commonly includes GB/T 37408, NB/T 32004, factory inspection records, and voluntary CQC/CGC-style certificates. These documents can help demonstrate design maturity, but they are not a substitute for IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports unless the report itself covers the IEC standard, model family, ratings, and environmental assumptions required by the South Sudan project.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全文件通常包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、工厂检验记录以及自愿性CQC/CGC类证书。这些文件有助于展示设计成熟度，但不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告，除非报告本身覆盖南苏丹项目要求的IEC标准、型号系列、额定值和环境假设。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全文件通常包括GB/T 37408、NB/T 32004、工廠檢驗記錄以及自願性CQC/CGC類證書。這些文件有助於展示設計成熟度，但不能替代IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告，除非報告本身覆蓋南蘇丹項目要求的IEC標準、型號系列、額定值和環境假設。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范
China voluntary PV inverter certification and factory inspection documentation

gap.en: Gap: South Sudan's nascent standards capacity makes project-owner due diligence especially important. Exporters should not rely only on China GB/T safety certificates; provide IEC 62109-1/-2 reports from an accredited laboratory, model-family coverage statements, thermal derating evidence for extreme heat, and installation instructions suitable for off-grid, diesel-hybrid, or weak-grid sites. Confirm with SSNBS, SSEC, the importer, and the donor/EPC whether any local inspection or import conformity step applies.
gap.zh: 差距：南苏丹标准能力仍处于起步阶段，因此项目业主尽调尤为重要。出口商不应仅依赖中国GB/T安全证书；应提供认可实验室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2报告、型号系列覆盖声明、适用于极端高温的热降额证据，以及适合离网、柴油混合或弱电网现场的安装说明。请与SSNBS、SSEC、进口商及捐助方/EPC确认是否适用任何本地检验或进口合格评定步骤。
gap.zht: 差距：南蘇丹標準能力仍處於起步階段，因此項目業主盡調尤為重要。出口商不應僅依賴中國GB/T安全證書；應提供認可實驗室出具的IEC 62109-1/-2報告、型號系列覆蓋聲明、適用於極端高溫的熱降額證據，以及適合離網、柴油混合或弱電網現場的安裝說明。請與SSNBS、SSEC、進口商及捐助方/EPC確認是否適用任何本地檢驗或進口合格評定步驟。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific and commonly mandatory in procurement practice for donor, utility, mini-grid, and commercial projects; national solar-inverter-specific certification enforcement remains nascent
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 evidence may support China-side voluntary certification or procurement but does not automatically satisfy South Sudan safety due diligence

source.publisher: International Organization for Standardization (ISO) / South Sudan National Bureau of Standards member listing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Use IEC 62109-1/-2 safety reports, heat-derating evidence, and project-specific installation controls as the practical baseline for South Sudan PV inverter supply. China GB/T 37408 and NB/T 32004 documents are useful but not automatically accepted; verify any SSNBS, SSEC, importer, or donor/EPC requirement before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 将IEC 62109-1/-2安全报告、高温降额证据和项目特定安装控制作为南苏丹光伏逆变器供货的实际基准。中国GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004文件有参考价值，但不会被自动接受；出货前核验任何SSNBS、SSEC、进口商或捐助方/EPC要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 將IEC 62109-1/-2安全報告、高溫降額證據和項目特定安裝控制作為南蘇丹光伏逆變器供貨的實際基準。中國GB/T 37408和NB/T 32004文件有參考價值，但不會被自動接受；出貨前核驗任何SSNBS、SSEC、進口商或捐助方/EPC要求。
